case_title: ETHAN M. WEISINGER VS. ASHISH GUPTA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY WEISINGER, ETHAN M. AS TO DEFENDANT GUPTA, ASHISH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEISINGER, ETHAN M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUPTA, ASHISH $2,978.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,083.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,800 HAVE BEEN ADDED TO THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GUPTA, ASHISH HEARING SET FOR JUL-24-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED MAY-14-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUPTA, ASHISH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEISINGER, ETHAN M.

COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT GUPTA, ASHISH
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W0413911D011, TAG # 032034 BY DEFENDANT GUPTA, ASHISH
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS **MOTION TO VACATE** HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ASHISH GUPTA ON SEP-05-2013 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
